description: Sustainability-linked bond. Coupon starts at 200bps; if the GHG-target KPI is not met by Jan 2027 it steps up to 300bps; if still not met by Jan 2028 it steps up to 400bps. Pre-bond-start period accrues zero. Real bonds use this shape with KPI verification triggering the step (not a fixed schedule); this rule encodes the post-trigger path.
